decisions.briefing: Markets were flat today — NASDAQ unchanged, S&P 500 up just 0.1% — with no strong directional catalyst. Cash sits at $444.94, just below the $500 threshold that would trigger a strong preference to fill open slots, so no new positions are initiated. AAOI is down ~4% from our average cost of $188.24 but remains well above the -7% stop-loss floor and still scores 90 on momentum, so it stays.

market_education.summary_en: U.S. equities drifted sideways on Monday as investors found little fresh news to act on, with the S&P 500 essentially flat and the NASDAQ unable to extend last week's gains. Sector rotation was muted — tech held steady while defensive names offered no clear outperformance — suggesting the market is in a consolidation phase following recent volatility. Traders appear to be waiting on the next macro catalyst, whether that is Fed commentary, earnings revisions, or developments on trade policy, before committing to a new directional move.
market_education.summary_zh: 美股週一窄幅橫行，標普500指數幾乎持平，納指亦未能延續上週漲勢。各板塊輪動不明顯，科技股維持穩定，防禦性類股也未見明顯超額表現，顯示市場在近期波動後正進入整固階段。交易員普遍觀望，等待聯準會官員表態、企業盈利預測修正或貿易政策最新進展等宏觀催化劑，再決定下一步方向。

daily_lesson.explanation_en: Consolidation describes a period when a market or stock trades in a narrow range without making significant new highs or lows — like today's flat session. It typically follows a strong move and reflects a tug-of-war between buyers and sellers before the next trend begins. For investors, consolidation can be a time to hold existing winners and preserve cash rather than chase new entries at unclear risk/reward.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 「整固」是指市場或個股在一段時間內窄幅震盪、未能突破新高或新低的狀態，就如今日的盤整走勢。這通常發生在一波強勁行情之後，多空雙方力量暫時均衡，等待下一個趨勢啟動。對投資者而言，整固期間的策略重點往往是持有現有強勢部位、保留現金，避免在方向未明時追高入場。
